status: Script updated — ready for Reinier to run

step_1_fix_redirect_uri.why: The redirect URI in the script must match exactly what is registered in your Etsy app settings. This is what caused the 'redirect URL is not permitted' error.

step_2_run_script.how: SSH into the droplet and run this command. No port forwarding needed.

step_3_browser.action: The script prints a URL. Open it in your browser.
step_3_browser.then: Log in to Etsy and click Allow Access.
step_3_browser.result: You will be redirected — the page may show an error or be blank. That is fine.

step_4_paste.action: Copy the FULL URL from your browser address bar after the redirect.
step_4_paste.then: Paste it into the terminal where the script is waiting.
step_4_paste.what_to_look_for: The URL will contain ?code= in it

step_5_done.next: Tell DevAgent — all 6 listings will be published immediately
